chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 538 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِذَا دَخَلْتَ اَلْجَبَّانَةَ فَقُلِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَى أَهْلِ اَلْجَنَّةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.538 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "When you enter the graveyard, say :
Al-salāmu ‘alā ahl al-jannah
“Peace be upon the people of Paradise."
